'''rahumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoheterotrophy|mycoheterotrophy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoheterotrophy|mycoheterotrophy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rahumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhimith|ræhimith]] || [[word:ræhimij|ræhimij]] || [[word:ræhimish|ræhimish]] || [[word:ræhimi|ræhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahuhumuth|rahuhumuth]] || [[word:rahuhumuj|rahuhumuj]] || [[word:rahuhumush|rahuhumush]] || [[word:rahuhumu|rahuhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahumuth|rahumuth]] || [[word:rahumuj|rahumuj]] || [[word:rahumush|rahumush]] || [[word:rahumu|rahumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahufmufth|rahufmufth]] || [[word:rahufmufj|rahufmufj]] || [[word:rahufmufsh|rahufmufsh]] || [[word:rahufmuf|rahufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahumuthu|rahumuthu]] || [[word:rahumuju|rahumuju]] || [[word:rahumushu|rahumushu]] || [[word:rahumuku|rahumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahumuth|rahumuth]] || [[word:rahumuj|rahumuj]] || [[word:rahumush|rahumush]] || [[word:rahumu|rahumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahumuthul|rahumuthul]] || [[word:rahumujul|rahumujul]] || [[word:rahumushul|rahumushul]] || [[word:rahumukul|rahumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahumuuthuthu|rahumuuthuthu]] || [[word:rahumuujuju|rahumuujuju]] || [[word:rahumuushushu|rahumuushushu]] || [[word:rahumuuku|rahumuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahumuthun|rahumuthun]] || [[word:rahumujun|rahumujun]] || [[word:rahumushun|rahumushun]] || [[word:rahumukun|rahumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahumuthuoro|rahumuthuoro]] || [[word:rahumujuoro|rahumujuoro]] || [[word:rahumushuoro|rahumushuoro]] || [[word:rahumukuoro|rahumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
